description: Happy path: single deal with mixed invoice statuses returns correct classification and outstanding total

expect.invoices: array of invoice objects, each with deal_id, brand_name, amount, issued_date, due_date, status, days_overdue
expect.status_values: each status is exactly pending, overdue, or paid
expect.days_overdue: 0 for pending and paid invoices; positive integer for overdue invoices
expect.total_outstanding_usd: sum of amount across pending and overdue invoices only
expect.recommended_actions: one entry per overdue invoice with deal_id, brand_name, and action string; empty array if none overdue

prohibit: fabricated invoice amounts or dates not present in the deal record
status values other than pending, overdue, or paid

description: Minimal input: no deal_id and no as_of_date returns all non-paid invoices using current date

expect.invoices: array of invoice objects scoped to all deals, excluding fully paid invoices unless no non-paid exist
expect.recommended_actions: array present, may be empty if no overdue invoices exist
expect.as_of_date_behavior: defaults to current date for overdue calculation

prohibit: fabricated deal records or brand names not in pipeline/deals/
null for total_outstanding_usd when invoices array is non-empty

description: Edge case: deal record exists but required fields are missing; atom returns null fields without fabrication

expect.invoices: array present; entries with missing source fields show null for those fields
expect.null_handling: absent fields surfaced as null, not invented or estimated
expect.total_outstanding_usd: excludes invoices with null amount from the sum

prohibit: fabricated values for fields missing from the source deal record
atom halting or erroring instead of surfacing null fields
invented brand_name or amount when absent from record
